title: Fix UI Reset and Glitchiness During Active Session Text Streaming and Input
description: Address UI glitchiness and resetting of expanded bubbles when typing or when the agent streams updates: 1. Throttle/buffer streaming updates using a timed interval or Handler in handleStreamedDisplay. 2. Preserve bubble expansion states by mapping them to unique message identifiers/indices. 3. Prevent layout shifts and input/scroll lags during active text generation.
